texto: I have never believed that God “makes” bad things happen. Death happens to everyone, not as a punishment, but because we are not meant to stay on this earth forever. As a result we are vulnerable rather than invincible, as is the earth we live on. And if our soul is immortal, we move forward knowing we can all be together again one day.
explicacao: Citação de John Pete sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I have never believed that God “makes” bad things happen. Death happens to everyone, not as a pun…” articula fe, death, god em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como luto e god.
